nisci.gov.vn_7228278624536640468.name: WordPress Upload and Execute
nisci.gov.vn_7228278624536640468.attack_vector: Upload a malicious PHP file to the WordPress upload directory and execute it to gain command execution

nisci.gov.vn_7228278624536640468.name: WordPress oEmbed SSRF
nisci.gov.vn_7228278624536640468.attack_vector: Exploit the oEmbed API to perform a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attack and potentially access internal services

nisci.gov.vn_7228278624536640468.name: WordPress File Upload and LFI
nisci.gov.vn_7228278624536640468.attack_vector: Upload a malicious PHP file to the WordPress upload directory and use it to perform a Local File Inclusion (LFI) attack
